name: pantheon-tui-plugin
description: Pantheon agent framework TUI sidebar plugin for OpenCode — agent registry, session context, and command palette

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bun build index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --entry-naming 'index.js' --external @opencode-ai/plugin && bun build tui.tsx --outdir dist --target node --format esm --entry-naming 'tui.js' --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opencode-ai/plugin/* --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/solid --external solid-js
